text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What should I say at the party? I need to figure out what kind of speech to give...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I imagine that, being a Mejiro, you must be in this
predicament quite often. I think I know how you
feel. I don't do well with public speaking either.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Really? You're so talkative about books. I
thought you must have a knack for speaking.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I can't really help that—I get so carried away!
...But I dread the thought of giving a speech.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
...Actually, I've always thought that you're a
particularly eloquent speaker. You seem so
confident and stately...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That's not true. My mind always goes blank in
front of a crowd.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Ah, me too! I try so hard to maintain my
composure, but it's simply an impossible task.

text_block_list.name: Rob Roy and Dober
text_block_list.text:
And I become incredibly depressed afterward!
And I get so depressed afterward!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Wow, you too? I didn't know we share so
much.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I had no idea you felt the same!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
...Um, if you could spare a while... would you like
to look for some public speaking books with me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Sure, I'd appreciate it. No one knows how to find
the right book like you, Rob Roy.
